JUDGE JOSEPH A. DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR 02:20PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. GREER SMITH FOR THE PLTF. THE DEFTS ARE PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE IS SETTLED. WRITTEN STIPULATION SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEVENERE, MICHAEL DES ANGLES, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2203 25TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $736.44 RENT, $113.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $849.44, STAYED UNTIL DEC-31-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, AT 05:00PM. PLTF TO PAY $ 5,000 AS MOVING EXPENSES WITHIN 48 HOURS AFTER BOTH DEFTS HAVE VACATED BY THE STIPULATED DATE AND TIME. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
